A bit rough, answering the door not expecting someone.
Heyy, uhm. I'm looking for Lio.
Leona opens the door
My. Look at you, eheheh.
Hi! Leona, right? Is this the place to get to L-
So, about that french kiss you mentioned, darling.
It wasn't just empty words, now was it, hmm?
S-sorry, I think there's a misunderstanding, it's just a passphrase, right?
So... About that little bookworm, hmm?
Yes, Lio! He's in his room.
Can you show me where it is?
I'd love to, darling. But well, I'm not really into all this tech stuff. The entrance to his room is in the back of my bedroom, but... I'm not sure how to open the door.
Oh, alright. Would you mind if I had a look?
Waiting for Lio to pick up the phone.
Heyyy Lio, uh... I just got out of the tunnels and-
Fhahh...! Hurry...! It- she's not- Ghh-... Letting me out of-
My bed is made of Marabou down. I could show you how amazingly soft it is, if you'd like, darling.
Let me know if you change your mind.
You really have a lot of tech for the cat.
When I moved here, I made sure to bring the important things.
I don't think Felicia would have felt at home otherwise.
Felicia sure does seem to have a caring owner.
You couldn't be more right, darling.
Your cat tree has a fish display?
Sure do, darling. Was a custom job. Spending money for Felicia used to be one of my favorite activities back then.
Wow, that's quite the computer.
Is it? I just... Watch some things on it every now and then.
D'aww look at this little cutie!
Do you like cooking?
Wish I didn't have to. Not exactly my... Style.
Then why do it?
Things just aren't what they used to be.
Right. Maybe you should make Lio cook for you!
Cooking may not exactly be my style, but at least it's edible. Unlike whatever he eats whenever he orders his junk.
Maybe you should come by some day and cook for me, darling.
Mhmm. Been way too long since I had a maid, ehehe.
Did I interrupt you eating?
Ah, no, no worries. Lio just skipped his breakfast.
Oh you eat together? That's cute!
Almost like having another child. Next to Felicia of course.
Heh, of course!
Do you also wash Lio's clothes?
I'm not his maid, darling.
Right, of course!
Black marker... Some thin metal plate with holes... Stick-on tattoos...
A concert ticket! Jackpot! Let's see the band name.
Oh, yeah. Now that I see it, I remember that he mentioned that name.
I guess we might be on the right track then... Maybe "COCK" turns into a code for the keypad somehow...
This is the door you're looking for.
Oh! I thought it was a closet.
And you don't know how to open it?
No, but you seem like a smart girl. I'm sure you'll figure it out.
Heh...! I'll try my best.
I knew you could do it, darling.
Thanks! I'll go visit Lio now then.
Have fun you two, ehehe.
Do you know what Lios favorite band is?
Favorite band? No, sorry.
I do know that he recently went to a concert though. The clothes from that night are still in the bathroom.
How do you know Lio by the way?
Apartment was a bit too big for myself and Felicia.
Ah, so you were looking for a flatmate?
Soo... He's not your flatmate?
Lets just say he pays his rent in a rather... unique arrangement, eheh.
Your flat is really pretty! Super cozy!
Oh darling, this is nothing. If only I could show you how I lived before GAG took over.
Of course. All the floors in there are intended like that.
Woah. I've never been anywhere that fancy.
I loved it at first. Routine however lets even the brightest light fade.
You mean you got bored of it?
Quite. Not that it matters anymore. Moving here has lead me to meeting you darling, so maybe it was worth it in the end, ehehe.
Jeez, Lio! Are you- Do you want me to- Give you a minute?!
Cut off by getting gagged when you're about to say 'thing'.
Zoey! Agh-! Get me outta this thin-!
Last key! Let's get you out of there, Lio!
Ahh- Holy fuck... Okay... ah- Let me... Let me help Jan out... and I'll uh... I'll clean up. Just give me a second.
And done! Eheh. Sorry you had to see that, Zoey.
Oh- heh. No worries. I've uh... seen worse!
Sooo uh... What'd ya need me for?
Well... uh... I need to get a fake made of this little device I found.
Ah yeah? This for a job of yours?
Something like that.
Well give it here. Let's see it.
Jesus, Zoey. What the hell is this thing?
It's just uh... a uh...
Trying to coax her into saying what it is.
Sassy and flamboyent
Just a little annoyed.
I can't make a convincing fake of this thing if I don't even know what it is. Just tell me, Zoey.
Tell him what the blocker is.
Don't tell him.
Can't or won't?
Look- It's important that I get this fake made as soon as possible.
Where'd you even get this thing from?
Huh? What the hell is a crush?
Uhhh... Well apparently it's the reason for the itch we've been feeling these past few years. This thing blocks it.
What?!  Wait, so you've been able to just... not be horny all the time?
Well... Not exactly. But it's helped.
Questioning, not annoyed.
Helped? Like with what?
Basically? It hasn't been easy, but... this blocker makes it possible.
Really? What else has it helped with?
Well... The way here for starters. Buncha pipes burst, so the tunnels were filled with haze.
Wha- Really? Shit, Zoey, I wouldn't have made you go through that tunnel if I knew.
No worries. I managed to make it in one piece thanks to the blocker.
And now you need me to make a fake of it? Why?
Well... I sorta kinda stole it?
Like trying to tell your parents you did something bad but don't wanna say it.
Wh- Are you serious, Zoey? Wait, was that you that made the commotion at the Redlight District? Fuck, this is not okay!
Maybe? I just need a fake to get them off me. They want me to bring it in to them, but I can't. If I do, bad things could happen.
And if you don't, you're screwed. Ugh. Fuck me, alright Zoey. Just lemme see what I can do. Give me a minute.
This thing's more complicated than I thought it'd be. The material's not like anything I've seen before. I can't just 3D print a double.
So... What does that mean?
Means you're gonna have to do some leg work. I've got a contact that can get their hands on the sorts of materials we'll need for this.
And where is this contact?
The Redlight District, the trains just opened back up after your little episode, so you should be good to go whenever you're ready.
Right... and who's the contact?
Her name's Nova. Nice gal, bit of a hard ass, but we've got a business understanding.
Hm? Have you two met?
Something like that?
She's got a gig pulling security for the Glowing Hole. I'm sure you know where to find it.
Yep. I know where that is alright.
Oh- Yeah, I think I already met her at the Glowing Hole.
Yeah, she has a gig pulling security there.
Go find her. I'll call ahead and let her know you're on the way. Once you've got the stuff from her, we can put your fake together.
Thanks, Lio. I'll let ya know when I've got what you need.
Oh, also I took the liberty of putting your ID into the database here, so you can come and go as you please without those musky tunnels.
W- You couldn't have done that earlier?
No, sorry. Needed you here to get an up-to-date imprint of your bio-signature. Hope that's okay.
Purely for practical purposes of course.
Did you two have fun in there, hun? Sure sounded like it, eheheh.
It's alright darling, I don't judge.
No, really, we're... Not like that...!
Oh, really now? Heh. Whatever you say, darling.
Uhhh... I have no idea how this thing works...
Got a key, Lio. Hopefully this fits!
Uhhh... I'm not taking anyone!
Uhhh... Okay Lio, I've got another key. Here goes nothing.
Jan? Who the hell is Jan?
Jan! Calm down, it's okay! I'm not going anywhe- a-ahh!
The data chips...! You need to- Ahh...!
Three...! There's three of them! Nghh...! One of the has the- Ah-...! The code...!
Data chip? Like for my neck port?
She certainly is.
Can you take a look at this headset for me?
Oh? It's an old BF-75d. These were everywhere before the crisis!
Understatement. It's a glorified paperweight. What even happened to this little guy?
I was hoping you could tell me.
Let me take a closer look.
It's pretty bad Zoey. The operating system is completely corrupted, and even some internals are fried. I don't think we're fixing this one.
Anything else? Do you think someone could have done this?
What, like a cyberattack? It would have to be a nasty little virus to get this much damage done.
My neighbor, she... Was wearing it when this happened...
I'll scour the web, find out whatever I can about it. I'll let you know if anything comes up.
